name: @zeropg/client
description: The unified zeropg client (Track E): one connect(DATABASE_URL) factory and one node-postgres-shaped interface over four engines (in-process PGlite for memory://, file:// with a cross-process lockfile, bucket-backed scale-to-zero zeropg over HTTP, and a graduated postgres:// passthrough). Only the connection string changes from laptop to bucket to always-on server.
